suppress.notes: Suppressing CVE-2026-33871, CVE-2026-33870 for io.netty:* 4.1.130.Final (e.g. netty-transport, netty-transport-native-unix-common). Same Netty CPE across multiple jars; await BOM upgrade.
plexus-utils 3.5.1 (transitive from Maven/build tooling). Suppress CVE-2025-67030 until the plugin/BOM chain picks up a fixed plexus-utils.
CVE-2023-1932 for quarkus-hibernate-validator-spi 3.32.3: false positive — issue is in Hibernate Validator core, not the Quarkus SPI jar; CPE maps artifact version to validator.
microprofile-config-api 3.1: CVE-2022-37422, CVE-2022-45129 match cpe:payara:payara:3.1 — Payara server issues, not this API jar (transitive from MicroProfile / Quarkus stack).
